GeneratedBy.Name: convert_m3cv.py (EEGDash)
GeneratedBy.Description: Reconstructed pseudo-continuous EEG from pre-epoched .mat files distributed via Kaggle. Epochs concatenated per subject/session/task. Original continuous recordings are not publicly available.
